title: Letter of Interest — District 7 Football Field Lining (Jun 2022)
html:
Job-application letter to grants pass or District 7 (his old K-12 district) for a summer "line the football fields" gig at North/South Middle School. Pure bridge income hustle while home for the summer. (Phone + email retained — these are Yahir's own contact info.)

grants pass or · bridge income strategies · 2022 07 05 Finalizing Summer Trip
